title: Square Root Calculator (√ and ∛)
shortDescription: Find the square root and cube root of any non-negative number instantly.
description: A free online square root calculator that computes the square root (√) of a non-negative number and also shows its cube root (∛). Enter any value greater than or equal to zero and get accurate results immediately.
metaDescription: Free square root calculator. Compute the square root (√) of any non-negative number and see its cube root (∛) instantly with accurate, easy-to-read results.

result.label: Roots
result.empty: Enter a number (≥ 0) to see its square root and cube root.

sections.heading: What is a square root?
paragraphs: The square root of a number x is the value that, when multiplied by itself, equals x. It is written with the radical symbol √. For example, √9 = 3 because 3 × 3 = 9.
In the real-number system, square roots are only defined for non-negative numbers, so this calculator requires a value of zero or greater.

sections.heading: Square root vs. cube root
paragraphs: The cube root (∛) of a number is the value that, used three times as a factor, returns the original number. For instance, ∛27 = 3 because 3 × 3 × 3 = 27.
This tool shows both roots at once so you can compare them and use whichever your problem needs.

howTo.name: Enter the value
howTo.text: Type a non-negative number (≥ 0) into the Value field.

howTo.name: Read the results
howTo.text: The calculator instantly displays the square root (√) and cube root (∛).

howTo.name: Adjust as needed
howTo.text: Change the value to recalculate the roots for a different number.

faq.q: Can I calculate the square root of a negative number?
faq.a: No. Square roots of negative numbers are not real, so this calculator only accepts values of zero or greater.

faq.q: What is the square root of 0?
faq.a: The square root of 0 is 0, because 0 × 0 = 0.

faq.q: Does this tool show the cube root too?
faq.a: Yes. Alongside the square root (√), it also displays the cube root (∛) of the same number.
Results are computed with high precision and rounded for readability, which is accurate enough for most math and study needs.

faq.q: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, it is completely free and runs directly in your browser with no sign-up required.
